text.title: Async Standup Methodology Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Async Standup Methodology end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: pick-channel
step.action: Pick one channel for standup (Slack / Discord / Notion DB).

step.name: publish-template
step.action: Pin the 3-question template; first run kicks off Monday.

step.name: operate-daily
step.action: Owner scans posts; pulls blockers into watch list.

step.name: weekly-rollup
step.action: Aggregate blockers by cause; pick top 3; assign owners.
step.decision-gate: If blockers >5 across week, schedule sync meeting.
